description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and define three variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS. Define a single build stage with a build job. In the global before_script run apt-get update and install wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, download the Android SDK tools zip for version ${ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS}, unzip it, silently update the SDK with filters android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, build-tools-${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extra-android-m2repository, extra-google-google_play_services, extra-google-m2repository, set ANDROID_HOME to the current directory, prepend it to PATH, and make gradlew executable. In the build job script change to the sample directory and execute ../gradlew assemble, then publish the app/build/outputs/ directory as artifacts.
